message:
refactor(cli): extract build_http_config helper and add serve-http tests

Extract HTTP config construction into a pure function `build_http_config()`
that is testable without starting a server. Move `handle_serve_stdio()` above
the new helper for clearer reading order.

Add two unit tests:
- `serve_http_overrides_are_applied`: verifies host/port/path CLI overrides
  propagate correctly into the Config struct
- `clap_parses_serve_http_flags`: validates clap arg parsing for the
  serve-http subcommand with all three optional flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
